The PDF source (pdftotext -layout output) shows the compact four-dot ellipsis format '....' on a line by itself between the introductory text and item (6). The DB text shows this as spaced '. . . . ' (with spaces between dots). Per the ellipsis rule, ND opinions print the compact four-dot form; the spaced form is an OCR/ingestion artifact.
